questions.text: The root system in monocots is:
questions.explanation: Monocots typically have fibrous root system arising from the base of the stem. Dicots have tap root system.

questions.text: In pea plants, the leaves are modified into tendrils.
questions.explanation: In pea plants, leaves are modified into tendrils for support and climbing.

questions.text: The arrangement of flowers on the floral axis is called ________.
questions.explanation: Inflorescence is the arrangement of flowers on the floral axis. Types include racemose and cymose.

questions.correctAnswer: Phyllotaxy is the pattern of arrangement of leaves on the stem or branch.
questions.explanation: Phyllotaxy is of three types: alternate, opposite, and whorled.
